source: Generated raster assets for the Phaser/Vite web game.

assets.name: building-icon-atlas
assets.usage: 4x4 sprite atlas for construction palette building icons and map UI accents.
assets.source: Built-in ImageGen, chroma-key background removed locally with remove_chroma_key.py.
assets.prompt_summary: 4x4 atlas of premium small E-Grid 2045 building icons: university, AI research, energy research, datacenter, gas, nuclear, wind, solar, hydro, battery, cooling, supergrid, slot, alert, CO2, blackout.
assets.constraints_da: 2D stylized semi-diegetic strategy map, premium simple shapes, readable at small size, no dashboard aesthetic, no text, no watermark; night slate base, cyan/green energy, orange/red deficit, icy blue cooling, controlled violet compute, ochre/dark red CO2.

assets.name: building-card-art-atlas
assets.usage: 4x3 raster atlas for construction cards, active building cards and construction queue cards in the web HUD.
assets.prompt_summary: 4x3 atlas of polished E-Grid 2045 building vignette illustrations: university, AI lab, energy research, datacenter, gas, nuclear, wind, solar, hydro, battery, cooling plant and supergrid hub.
assets.constraints_da: 2D stylized semi-diegetic strategy map concept art, dark blue-night map tiles, premium simple building silhouettes, readable at small card size, no dashboard aesthetic, no text, no numbers, no logos, no watermark.
